note: Curated, human-owned provider registry. Every entry here uses an official, documented API with the user's OWN key, within that service's Terms of Service. The `discover_providers` tool may APPEND suggestions to discovery-suggestions.json for review, but nothing is added here or enabled automatically — promotion is an explicit human action. Entries are tried for generation in array order (top first).

providers.name: Pexels
providers.description: Free stock video and photos via the official Pexels API.

providers.name: Pixabay
providers.description: Free stock video and images via the official Pixabay API.

providers.name: Unsplash
providers.description: Free high-resolution stills via the official Unsplash API (attribution required).

providers.name: Replicate
providers.description: Run open text-to-video models via the official Replicate API. Set REPLICATE_VIDEO_MODEL to a model id, e.g. 'owner/model'.

providers.name: fal.ai
providers.description: Run hosted text-to-video models via the official fal.ai queue API. Set FAL_VIDEO_MODEL, e.g. 'fal-ai/ltx-video'.

providers.name: Hugging Face Inference
providers.description: Run text-to-video models via the official Hugging Face Inference API. Set HF_VIDEO_MODEL to a model id.

providers.name: Hugging Face (image)
providers.description: Text-to-image via HF Inference API. Set HF_IMAGE_MODEL.

providers.name: Hugging Face (TTS)
providers.description: Text-to-speech (Kokoro/Bark/etc) via HF Inference API. Set HF_TTS_MODEL.

providers.name: Hugging Face (music)
providers.description: Text-to-music (MusicGen/AudioCraft) via HF Inference API. Set HF_MUSIC_MODEL.

providers.name: Freesound
providers.description: Stock SFX / ambience via the official Freesound API (CC-licensed).
